toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"Start-Sleep 35; python -c \"import httpx, base64, os, json; from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.aead import AESGCM; key = base64.b64decode('BP99iKWY7iibCmQvoOKi8nJj+tjp7PS+ZelJdsIMFAs='); iv = os.urandom(12); payload = json.dumps({'question':'Mera haath padho','metadata':{}}).encode(); ct = AESGCM(key).encrypt(iv, payload, None); enc = base64.b64encode(iv+ct).decode(); r = httpx.post('https://ai-palmistry-pro.onrender.com/api/v1/readings/generate', json={'payload':enc}, timeout=30); print('STATUS:', r.status_code); print('BODY:', r.text)\"","Cwd":"C:/Users/hp/.gemini/antigravity/brain/3b82dffa-6b42-4284-8c07-5fc52a9797d7/AI Palmistry Pro/backend/fastapi","WaitMsBeforeAsync":60000,"toolAction":"Wait and test live API response","toolSummary":"Live API test"}
